field_of_view_deg: 198.5 horizontal / 198.5 vertical (full fisheye view); 121.1 (high detail/dewarped area)
features: built-in analytics: Object Based Motion Detection, Tampering Detection, Shock Detection, Digital Auto Tracking, Object Line Crossing Detection, Object Enter Area Detection, Missing Object Detection, Unattended Object Detection, ...
ONVIF Compliant: Yes, Profile G, Profile T, Profile Q, Profile M* (To be available through future firmware upgrade)
UL (for optional PoE injector and power adapter)

home_assistant.notes: Use ONVIF integration. RTSP port is 7070 by default.

blue_iris.notes: Select 'ACTi' profile. Default RTSP port is 7070.
